svg.text: FlashMLA sparse kernel I/O — shape summary
q : [Tp, n_h_padded=128, 576] bf16 query tokens (padded to 64/128 heads)
kv : [M * PREFILL_CHUNK, 1, 576] bf16 gathered dense KV workspace
indices : [Tp, 1, K_total] int32 merged topk ∪ SWA, causal-masked
topk_length : [Tp] int32 valid K per query
attn_sink : [n_h=128] or [padded_heads] float32 learnable z′ (prepended softmax denom)
out : [Tp, 128, 576] bf16 pre-allocated slice of o_padded
k_cache : [B_s, 64, 1, 584 B] uint8 SWA paged cache
indices : [Td, n_win=128] int32 SWA window indices
topk_length : [Td] int32 valid SWA len per query
extra_k_cache (if sparse) : [B_c, 64, 1, 576 B] uint8 compressed paged cache
extra_indices_in_kvcache : [Td, 1, 1024] int32 global top-k indices (CSA) / precomputed (HCA)
extra_topk_length : [Td] int32 valid extra len per query
tile_scheduler_metadata : opaque blob int32 prebuilt per-layer-type, reused across layers + CG replay
